# filter()

**Instance Method**

Returns the Core Image filter associated with the view.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor func filter() -> CIFilter!
```

## Return Value

The Core Image filter associated with the view.

## Getting Data from the Filter View

- **objectController()**: Returns the object controller for the bindings between the filter and its view.
